name: German Cabbage Muffins Xcnm40a
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine flour, baking powder, salt, sugar, onion flakes, and celery seed thoroughly.
2. Add the grated cabbage and stir into the dry ingredients.
3. Whisk eggs, milk, and melted butter together well.
4. Add to dry ingredients and stir quickly, ensuring it isn't over mixed for more than 10 seconds.
5. Spoon batter into greased muffin pans.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 400°F for 20 minutes. Makes 12 Stan Forsman XCNM40B.
